operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Hamas Delays Disarmament; Trump Extends Iran Pause to Apr 6; 72,278 Palestinians Killed
heroSubtitle: Hamas yet to formally respond to Board of Peace disarmament plan; Trump extends Iran-war pause by 10 days to April 6; Lancet Mortality Survey estimates 75,200+ violent deaths through Jan 2025; UNDP cargo suspended; 391 UNRWA staff killed — highest in UN history
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,278+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / WAFA, Mar 29 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803. UNDP shipments suspended Mar 25, 2026 after contraband discovery. Lancet Mortality Survey: 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025.
